title: Better Vanilla Animals - Heycronus
description: Better Vanilla Animals enhances the appearance of Minecraft's farm animals, making them more detailed and realistic while keeping the original vanilla style! 🐄🐓🐑🐖
body:
🐾 Better Vanilla Animals – Improve Minecraft’s Animals! 🐾
Better Vanilla Animals enhances the appearance of Minecraft's farm animals, making them more detailed and realistic while keeping the original vanilla style! 🐄🐓🐑🐖

✨ Main Features:
✔️ Cow & Sheep – Now have an adorable snout, making them even cuter! 🐮🐑
✔️ Chicken – Features a more realistic mane and tail for extra detail. 🐔
✔️ Pig – Now has a cute little curly tail for a more natural look! 🐷
✔️ Other Improvements – Subtle visual tweaks to make animals feel more immersive and lifelike.

🔹 Vanilla-Friendly – Keeps the original Minecraft aesthetic while enhancing animal visuals.
🔹 Lightweight & Simple – Perfect for players who want better-looking animals without performance loss.
⚠️ OptiFine Required – This texture pack uses custom entity models (CEM) and requires OptiFine to work properly.

Bring more life to your world with Better Vanilla Animals! 🏡✨
